title: Dungeons Crit Sound
description: Replaces the Critical Hit sound with the one from Minecraft Dungeons.
body:
# Dungeons Crit Sound

This pack does what the name says. It changes the normal critical hit sound and replaces it with the one from Minecraft Dungeons. 

## Example Video

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rQZqfKehisY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

[Alternate Link](https://youtu.be/rQZqfKehisY)

## Why are there duplicate folders in the Zip?
If you are seeing this when opening the pack, this is a byproduct of me being on a Mac.
MacOS makes these files when archiving files, these are MacOS metadata files that contain info that only MacOS uses.
